title: Intrinsic TGF-b Signaling Attenuates Proximal Tubule Mitochondrial Injury and Inflammation in Chronic Kidney Disease
author: Nlandu Khodo, Stellor
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Bulk RNA sequencing processed count files for the article titled "Intrinsic TGF-b Signaling Attenuates Proximal Tubule Mitochondrial Injury and Inflammation in Chronic Kidney Disease", by Nlandu Khodo et al., in review.  

 Corresponding GEO submission can be found here: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE225545
